dialogue1.phrase: Looks like we have a Study Session now!

dialogue2.phrase: Here at RetroCODE, studying software architecture is important.

dialogue3.phrase: Especially because 'it works on my machine' is not an official methodology.

dialogue4.phrase: In this activity, you'll solve an energy‑directing minigame.

dialogue5.phrase: Your goal is to change the direction of the blocks to create a valid path from source to destination. I think it will become clearer when you start…

dialogue6.phrase: Some blocks have a description, characteristic, or concept related to the architectural pattern you're learning.

dialogue7.phrase: But not all blocks belong to the selected pattern. Some are here by confusion of their system's database.

dialogue8.phrase: Besides correctly connecting the energy from start to finish, you also need to pay attention to the information written on each piece and connect the correct ones.

dialogue9.phrase: Choose the right blocks, align the connections, and make the energy reach the final destination. It's like a neuron connection with knowledge!

dialogue10.phrase: Before you start, you can choose which architectural pattern you'd like to learn among the available ones. Each has its own advantages, disadvantages, and characteristics.

dialogue11.phrase: You'll see a small summary on the screen… But detailed information is also available, just click that little button.

dialogue12.phrase: Looks like today we only have one choice. I guess their system recovery is still difficult.

dialogue13.phrase: That AI‑performed deletion of the /System and /bin folders without confirmation is truly chaotic. I hope that doesn't happen to our system.
